narrative:
Precinct Senecaville (precinct in Guernsey County) has 245 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.5%, a clear Republican lean of 8.2 percentage points.
